senses.definition_en: noun class 2, 3 or 14 equivalent of cho
senses.definition_dg: Chako, neno ra kuonyesa kukala chitu ni cha mutu munjine.

examples.en: Your name, your deeds, your book, your house.
examples.sw: Jina lako, matendo yako, kitabu chako, nyumba yako.

senses.definition_dg: Chako, neno ra kuonyesa kukala chitu ni cha mutu munjine.

examples.dg: Dzinaro, mahendogo, chitabucho, nyumbayo, uvyazio, etc
examples.en: Your name, your deeds, your book, your house, your descendents, etc
examples.sw: Jina lako, matendo yako, kitabu chako, nyumba yako.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchoma chitu kpwa moho, kuocha.

examples.dg: Ocha nyama kpwa moho hadi ikale tayari.
examples.en: Roast the meat on the fire until it is ready.
examples.sw: Choma nyama kwa moto hadi iwe tayari.

senses.definition_en: ngulu to slander someone, to speak against someone, to speak evil of someone, to defame someone (i.e. to give someone give bad smell)
senses.definition_dg: Kugomba mambo mabii kuhusu mutu ili atu amzire, kutiya fitina.

examples.en: Don't slander people, it is wrong.

senses.definition_en: to be full, to overflow (with sana)
senses.definition_dg: Kukala kumejala, kutokuwa na phatu phanjine, kuodzala.

examples.en: The

equivalents_en: ona bucket is full. Muho ukaodzala sana. The river overflowed

senses.definition_en: ona bucket is full. Muho ukaodzala sana. The river overflowed
senses.definition_dg: Kuona ichikala ndoo au chombo chimejala.

examples.en: The bucket is full, don't add more water.

examples.dg: kujaa na kupwa Phrase: Kuodzala na kupwa
examples.en: To rise and fall (of the tide)

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu hadi phatu phajale, kujaza.

examples.en: She filled the bucket

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayefwanya kazi ya serikali au shirika, afisa.

examples.en: The government officer came to the village.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha kuhendere kazi ya kuandika na kusoma, ofisi.

examples.en: Father goes to the office every day.

senses.definition_en: to bathe, to wash one's body
senses.definition_dg: Kuoga, kufula mwiri na madzi.

examples.en: Bathe before going to school.

equivalents_en: madzi to complete the three day mourning period after a funeral
equivalents_sw: kumala siku ya tatu ya maziko

senses.definition_en: madzi to complete the three day mourning period after a funeral
senses.definition_sw: kumala siku ya tatu ya maziko
senses.definition_dg: Kumaliza siku ya hahu ya mazishi, ambapo atu anaoga na kuisha kpwa msiba.

examples.dg: Atu aoga siku ya hahu bada ya mazishi.
examples.en: People bathed on the third day after the burial.
examples.sw: Watu walioga siku ya tatu baada ya mazishi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuosha mutu, kumuogesa.

examples.en: Mother is bathing her young child.

senses.definition_dg: Kumtiya mutu woga, kuogosha.

examples.en: Don't frighten the child, he will run from you.

senses.definition_en: to bring animals together, to round up a herd
senses.definition_dg: Kukusanya nyama wa kuriswa phamwenga, kuuyiza ng'ombe chaani.

examples.en: Tomorrow morning we will round up the cattle.

senses.definition_en: to be afraid, to fear, to obey, to respect
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na woga, kuogopha chitu au mutu.

examples.en: Don't be afraid, God is with you.

senses.definition_en: to bask in the sun, to warm oneself near a fire
senses.definition_dg: Kusagala kpwenye dzuwa au phahi-phahi na moho kpwa kuphaha joto.

examples.dg: Kuna umande, kpwa hivyo naoha dzuwa
examples.en: It's cold, so I'm basking in the sun
examples.sw: Kuna umande, kwa hivyo naota jua.

examples.en: When the sun has risen, bask in it
examples.sw: Kuna umande, kwa hivyo naota jua.

senses.definition_dg: Kuogelea kpwenye madzi.

examples.en: The children are swimming in the river.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga sauti ya kutaphika bila kuhaphika, au kupiga kelele kulu (kuhusu tembo).

examples.dg: Mgonjwa anaoka kpwa sababu ana fyokpwa.
examples.en: The sick person is retching because he has malaria.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa anakokomoka kwa sababu ana malaria.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga sauti kulu (kuhusu tembo tu).

examples.en: The elephant trumpeted in the bush.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchemka, madzi kukala na mavavuho ga joto.

examples.en: The water is boiling, add the tea.

senses.definition_dg: Kuokoa mutu kula kpwenye hatari.

examples.en: He saved the child who was drowning.

senses.definition_dg: Kuola, kuvunda.

examples.dg: Proverb: Muoza nyama ni mwenye muhambo
examples.en: The one who lets the animal/meat rot is the one who owns the trap
examples.sw: Methali: Anayeoza nyama ni mwenye mfuko.

senses.definition_dg: Kutota, kukala chi chimejala na madzi.

examples.en: The clothes got soaked from the rain.

senses.definition_dg: Kuolaga mutu au nyama, kuua.

examples.dg: Usiolage mutu, ni kosa kulu sana.
examples.en: Don't kill a person, it is a very serious crime.
examples.sw: Usiue mtu, ni kosa kubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhesabu nambari au vitu.

examples.dg: Olanga nambari kula mwenga hadi kumi.
examples.en: Count the numbers from one to ten.
examples.sw: Hesabu nambari kutoka moja hadi kumi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuonyesa chitu kpwa chala, kuoloha.

examples.dg: Usiolohe atu kpwa chala, si vinono.
examples.en: Don't point at people with your finger, it's not nice.
examples.sw: Usiwaonyeshe watu kwa kidole, si vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kusagala na mutu chizani, kujamiana.

examples.dg: Ni dzambo ra siri kahi-kahi ya mutu na mchumba wake.
examples.en: It is a private matter between a person and their spouse.
examples.sw: Ni jambo la siri kati ya mtu na mwenzi wake.

senses.definition_en: to have a hole, and hence to spring a leak (buckets, boats, etc.)
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na tundu, kuhendesa madzi yatuluke ndani, kutoboka.

examples.en: The boat has sprung a leak

senses.definition_en: to drill, to break through (e.g. sun)
senses.definition_dg: Kutoboa tundu kpwa chombo chenye ncha, au dzuwa kutuluka kpwenye mawingu.

examples.dg: Fundi wa mbao kala anaombola tundu
examples.en: The carpenter was drilling a hole
The sun is breaking though the cloud

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mbere ya dau au meli.

examples.en: Sit at the prow of the canoe.

senses.definition_dg: Kuona chitu kpwa matso, kusikira, kufikiri.

examples.en: How are

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya neno oza. Kuola, kuvunda.

examples.dg: Onda ni neno ranjine ra kuola.
examples.en: Onda is another word for rot.
examples.sw: Onda ni neno jingine la kuoza.

senses.definition_en: to waste away, to become thin
senses.definition_dg: Kuondza, kukala mwembamba kpwa ukongo au kukosa chakurya.

examples.en: The sick person wasted away and became thin.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya mutu woga, kushtua.

examples.en: The snake frightened him, and he ran away.

senses.definition_dg: Kulazimisha mutu kuhenda mambo ya chizani bila kutaka kwakwe.

examples.dg: Mutu anayeondzorera ni mkosaji wa shariya.
examples.en: A person who rapes is a criminal.
examples.sw: Mtu anayebaka ni mkosaji wa sheria.

senses.definition_en: to discriminate against someone, to victimise or pick on someone
senses.definition_dg: Kumtendere mutu vibaya kpwa sababu ya ukoo wakege au sura yake, kubagua.

examples.dg: Usionere mutu kpwa sababu ya rangi ya ngoziye.
examples.en: Don't discriminate against a person because of their skin color.
examples.sw: Usibague mtu kwa sababu ya rangi ya ngozi yake.

senses.definition_en: to be of the opinion that
senses.definition_dg: Kuwa na maoni kukala chitu ni hivyo, kuonelea.

examples.dg: Ninaonerera kukala hiri ni dzambo nono.
examples.en: I am of the opinion that this is a good thing.
examples.sw: Ninaonelea kwamba hili ni jambo zuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyamaza mutu, kutuliza mutu ariye na taabu.

examples.en: A bad song is not used to soothe a baby

senses.definition_dg: Kuindza nyama tsakani.

examples.en: Father went to hunt animals in the bush.

equivalents_en: comfort a child by singing to it

senses.definition_en: to comfort a child by singing to it
senses.definition_dg: Kubembeleza mwanache kpwa kumwimbira nyimbo ili anyamale.

examples.en: Mother is soothing her child when it cries.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya longoza. Kuongoza atu.

examples.en: The chief leads the people of his village.
examples.sw: Chifu anaongoza watu wa kijiji chake.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya maoni.

examples.en: People's opinions are different.
examples.sw: Maoni ya watu ni tofauti tofauti.

senses.definition_dg: Kumambira mutu ahende makini au asihende chitu, kuonya.

examples.en: The teacher warned the child not to be late.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuonyesa mutu chitu, kumuhendesa mutu aone.

examples.en: Show me the way to the market.

equivalents_en: cause pain by touching a raw wound

senses.definition_en: to cause pain by touching a raw wound
senses.definition_dg: Kugusa chironda na kuchiumiza.

examples.en: Don't touch my wound, it hurts!

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuambira mutu ahende makini, onyo.

examples.dg: Wahewa onyo kpwa sababu ya makosa gakege.
examples.en: He was given a warning because of his mistakes.
examples.sw: Alipewa onyo kwa sababu ya makosa yake.

senses.definition_dg: Kuolaga, kuua.

examples.dg: Oraga ni neno ranjine ra olaga.
examples.en: Oraga is another word for olaga (to kill).
examples.sw: Oraga ni neno jingine la kuua.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhesabu, kuolanga.

examples.dg: Oranga ni neno ranjine ra olanga.
examples.en: Oranga is another word for olanga (to count).
examples.sw: Oranga ni neno jingine la kuhesabu.

equivalents_en: carry on the back or hip

senses.definition_en: to carry on the back or hip
senses.definition_dg: Kubeba mwanache mgongoni au chiunoni.

examples.en: Mother carries her child on her back.

senses.definition_dg: Kuosha mwiri wa mutu ariyefwa, kusafisha iti.

examples.dg: Achetu aosha mwiri wa mutu ariyefwa.
examples.en: The women washed the body of the deceased.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa kukala vitu vyosi au atu osi.

examples.en: We all
You all
The whole person (exceptional form)
All the people
All the bread
All the loaves
The whole fruit
All the fruit
The whole book
All the books
The whole house
All the houses
The whole night

senses.definition_dg: Kukusanya vitu phamwenga.

examples.dg: Otsa-otsa kuni zosi kpwenye chifungu chimwenga.
examples.en: Gather all the firewood into one pile.
examples.sw: Kusanya kuni zote kwenye fungu moja.

senses.definition_dg: Kupinda, kukala chitu chimepinda.

examples.dg: Muhi ukaotyoka kpwa sababu ya upepo.
examples.en: The tree bent because of the wind.
examples.sw: Mti ulipindika kwa sababu ya upepo.

senses.definition_dg: Chenye kuola, kibaya, kirichovunda.

examples.en: Throw away the rotten mango, it can't be eaten.

senses.definition_dg: Bila sababu, kpwa uzembe.

examples.dg: Usihende mambo ovyo, henda kpwa busara.
examples.en: Don't do things without reason, act wisely.
examples.sw: Usifanye mambo ovyo, fanya kwa busara.

senses.definition_dg: Kupumzika, kutohenda kazi kpwa muda.

examples.en: Rest a little, then you'll work again.
examples.sw: Pumzika kidogo, kisha utafanya kazi tena.
